sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26865" key="dikaioqe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐκαιο-θέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., Baillet <sense id="n26865.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Inscr.des tombeaux des rois</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1836</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
